        description = "Detection for GhostSocks Turns Victim Systems Into Residential Proxies for Evasive Cyberattack"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-03-31"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-UNKNOWN" ascii wide nocase
        $kw0 = "GhostSocks" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

snort_rules.rule_text: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-5179 - SourceCodester Simple Doctors Appointment Sy"; content:"CVE-2026-5179"; nocase; sid:5773872; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)
